meta.projectDescription: AI-powered food safety and facility compliance management platform
meta.purpose: IP Disclosure Package v3 — Architecture Audit

phase1_codebase_structure.framework: React 18.3.1 + React Router v7.13.0 + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS
phase1_codebase_structure.backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Edge Functions + Storage + Realtime)

coreTables.organizations: Multi-tenant org container — id, name, slug, industry_type, plan_tier
coreTables.locations: Physical locations under orgs — address, jurisdiction, location_type
coreTables.user_profiles: Extended user info — phone, title, preferences
coreTables.compliance_score_snapshots: Point-in-time compliance scores with model versioning
coreTables.intelligence_sources: Crawl feed registry — URLs, crawl status, frequency
coreTables.jurisdiction_configs: Per-jurisdiction scoring rules, weights, grading schemes
coreTables.equipment: Physical equipment inventory with lifecycle tracking
coreTables.incidents: Incident log with severity, type, resolution
coreTables.corrective_actions: Corrective action tracking with due dates and assignment

phase1_canonical_scoring.purpose: Add model versioning to compliance_score_snapshots, create score_model_versions registry
phase1_canonical_scoring.seedVersion: 1.0 — CalCode deduction model, 2-pillar (Food Safety + Fire Safety)

phase2_risk_translation.purpose: Create risk_assessments table — intelligence→risk correlation store

phase3_intelligence_normalization.purpose: Unify 5 intelligence stores into 1 (intelligence_insights) with source_type discriminator

intelligence.notes: Full pipeline: collect → auto-publish → feed → deliver; collect uses Anthropic for classification

externalApiIntegrations.anthropic: Claude API — ai-chat, ai-corrective-action-draft, ai-document-analysis, ai-text-assist, ai-weekly-digest, benchmark-quarterly-report, classify-document, copilot-analyze, intelligence-collect, landing-chat, monitor-regulations, rfp-classify, training-ai-companion

layoutSystem.adminShell: src/components/layout/AdminShell.tsx — admin page wrapper with breadcrumb
layoutSystem.routeGuard: ProtectedLayout in App.tsx wraps all authenticated routes with <Outlet>

sharedComponents.StatCard: src/components/admin/StatCard.tsx — unified KPI card for admin pages

complianceScoring.purpose: Two-pillar compliance score (Food Safety + Facility Safety)

jurisdictionScoring.purpose: CRS normalization — maps diverse inspection systems to unified 0-100 scale
jurisdictionScoring.patentRelevance: CRS (Compliance Risk Score) normalization algorithm — converts incompatible jurisdiction scoring systems to a single comparable scale

checkupScoring.purpose: Kitchen Checkup self-assessment scoring with dollar-impact estimates

insuranceRiskScoring.purpose: 4-category insurance risk assessment with trend adjustment
insuranceRiskScoring.v2Enhancements: Trend adjustment, configurable inputs, separated calculation from data access

benchmarkEngine.purpose: Peer group comparison and percentile ranking across jurisdictions
benchmarkEngine.patentRelevance: Jurisdiction difficulty normalization — accounts for varying inspection rigor when comparing scores

correlationEngine.purpose: Signal-to-organization relevance scoring for intelligence targeting
correlationEngine.patentRelevance: Multi-factor signal correlation — industry type, jurisdiction, scope, cuisine type

phase6_intelligence_pipeline.dataFlow: crawl (trigger-crawl/Firecrawl) → classify (intelligence-collect/Claude AI) → queue (intelligence_signals) → approve (intelligence-approve) → publish (intelligence-auto-publish) → deliver (intelligence-deliver) → display (ClientIntelligenceFeed)

adminPages.IntelligenceAdmin: src/pages/admin/IntelligenceAdmin.tsx — Signal approval queue with dismiss/restore, category/date filters, AI risk classification
adminPages.CommandCenter: src/pages/admin/CommandCenter.tsx — Crawl feed health monitoring, Run Now trigger

libModules.intelligenceBridge: src/lib/intelligenceBridge.ts — One-way push from live app to Intelligence project (fire-and-forget, 5s timeout)
libModules.intelligencePersonalizer: src/lib/intelligencePersonalizer.ts — Adjusts financial impact and personalizes insights per org
libModules.intelligenceRouter: src/lib/intelligenceRouter.ts — Severity scoring and auto/notify/hold routing tiers

aiClassification.sourceVerification: Source URL and verification status displayed on signals

configStructure.scoringMethod: weighted_deduction | percentage | violation_count | pass_fail | letter_grade | numerical_score
configStructure.weightColumns: ALL set to NULL — no verified weights exist yet

phase7_jurisdiction_intelligence_engine.demoJurisdictions: src/data/demoJurisdictions.ts — static configs for demo mode
phase7_jurisdiction_intelligence_engine.patentRelevance: JIE maps 57+ heterogeneous county inspection frameworks onto a single canonical scoring model, enabling cross-jurisdiction compliance comparison — a novel capability in food safety software

permissionSystem.routeGuards: src/lib/routeGuards.ts — pathname-to-role mapping for restricted routes

featureGating.orgTypeGating: requiredOrgTypes on FeatureDefinition — gates by industry_type

sidebarConfiguration.navItemRegistry: I object — contains all possible nav items with path, label, icon
sidebarConfiguration.perRoleConfigs: getRoleConfig() returns section array per UserRole
sidebarConfiguration.kitchenStaffSpecial: Dedicated 5-tab layout (Today, Checklists, Temps, Diagnosis, Report)

phase9_guided_tour.tourConfig: src/config/tourModules.ts — ALL_MODULES constant with 7 groups, 40+ modules

demoGuard.mechanism: Proxy wrapper around SupabaseClient that intercepts all write operations in demo mode

rowLevelSecurity.pattern: Organization-scoped — users can only access data within their organization
rowLevelSecurity.keyPolicies: Users can view/insert/update/delete within their org (user_location_access junction)

dataIsolation.multiTenancy: Organization-scoped RLS on all tenant tables
dataIsolation.demoIsolation: Demo mode uses static data from src/data/ — never touches real DB
dataIsolation.vendorIsolation: Vendor-scoped RLS for vendor document access

reactContexts.name: AuthContext
reactContexts.purpose: Supabase auth state, session, user management

reactContexts.name: DemoContext
reactContexts.purpose: Demo mode state, demo session tracking

reactContexts.name: EmulationContext
reactContexts.purpose: Admin user emulation for support debugging

reactContexts.name: InactivityContext
reactContexts.purpose: Idle timeout detection and session expiry

reactContexts.name: OfflineContext
reactContexts.purpose: Offline detection, sync queue, conflict resolution

reactContexts.name: OperatingHoursContext
reactContexts.purpose: Business hours for time-sensitive compliance checks

reactContexts.name: RoleContext
reactContexts.purpose: User role state with location-based role assignments

crs_normalization.description: Compliance Risk Score normalization — converts 7+ incompatible jurisdiction inspection scoring systems (calcode_deduction, percentage, violation_count, pass_fail, weighted_deduction, letter_grade, numerical_score) to a single 0-100 scale, enabling cross-jurisdiction comparison
crs_normalization.novelty: No existing food safety platform normalizes across heterogeneous scoring systems

three_phase_canonical_engine.description: Three-phase architecture: (1) Canonical Scoring with model versioning and inputs_hash for reproducibility, (2) Risk Translation Layer mapping compliance scores to 4 risk dimensions with insurance tier calculation, (3) Intelligence Normalization unifying 5+ data sources into single store with source_type discriminator
three_phase_canonical_engine.novelty: Reproducible, versioned compliance scoring with automated risk translation

intelligence_correlation.description: Multi-factor signal correlation engine — scores relevance of regulatory signals to specific organizations based on industry type, jurisdiction, operational scope, and cuisine type, with auto/notify/hold routing tiers based on severity
intelligence_correlation.novelty: Automated regulatory intelligence targeting and personalization for food service operators

jurisdiction_difficulty_normalization.description: Benchmark normalization that accounts for jurisdiction inspection rigor — a 90 in a strict jurisdiction is weighted differently than a 90 in a lenient one when computing peer group rankings

anti_aggregation_architecture.description: Multi-layer data isolation: RLS org-scoping (769 policies), demo write proxy (Supabase client wrapper), route guards, feature gating by plan tier and org type — prevents any cross-tenant data leakage
anti_aggregation_architecture.novelty: Defense-in-depth data isolation with demo-mode write interception
